faqs.question: How often do I need mosquito control treatments in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection during Lyndhurst's mosquito season (April through October), we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks. Properties near the Passaic River or Meadowlands wetlands may benefit from more frequent applications due to higher mosquito populations in these areas.

faqs.question: Are your mosquito treatments safe for children and pets in Lyndhurst?
faqs.answer: Yes, our mosquito control products are EPA-approved and safe for families and pets once dry, typically within 30 minutes of application. We use targeted application methods to minimize environmental impact while maximizing effectiveness against mosquitoes in your yard.
